name: Consolidated Communications Holdings, Inc.
description: Consolidated Communications Holdings, Inc. is a leading broadband and business communications provider in the United States. The company offers a wide range of fiber-based services, including high-speed internet, data, voice, cloud, and managed services, to residential, business, and carrier customers across its service areas. Leveraging its extensive fiber network, Consolidated Communications delivers reliable, high-quality connectivity solutions designed to meet the evolving needs of its diverse customer base.
